page.text: Master MV Marina: Coastguard Ostend, Coastguard Ostend, Coastguard Ostend. This is MV Marina, MV Marina, MV Marina. How do you read me? Over. Ostend Coastguard: MV Marina, MV Marina, MV Marina. This is Coastguard Ostend, Coastguard Ostend, Coastguard Ostend. I read you four. Go ahead with your message. Over. Master MV Marina: Coastguard Ostend. This is MV Marina. I have accidental spillage of oil in position 51 degrees 45 minutes North/003 degrees 12 minutes East at 2325 UTC extending 12 metres by three metres to North. Over. Ostend Coastguard: MV Marina. This is Coastguard Ostend. Say again. Over. Master MV Marina: Coastguard Ostend. This is MV Marina. I have accidental spillage of oil in position 51 degrees 45 minutes North/003 degrees 12 minutes East at 2325 UTC extending 12 metres by three metres to North. Over.

Ostend Coastguard: MV Marina. This is Coastguard Ostend. Message understood. Can you stop spillage? Over. Master MV Marina: Coastguard Ostend. This is MV Marina. No, I cannot stop spillage. Over. Ostend Coastguard: MV Marina. This is Coastguard Ostend. What kind of assistance is required? Over. Master MV Marina: Coastguard Ostend. This is MV Marina. I require oil clearance assistance. Over. Ostend Coastguard: MV Marina. This is Coastguard Ostend. I will send oil clearance assistance. ADVICE. Stay in vicinity of pollution and co-operate with oil clearance team. Over. Master MV Marina: Coastguard Ostend. This is MV Marina. Message understood. I will stay in vicinity of pollution and co-operate with oil clearance team. Out.
